greeting.title: Greeting
greeting.p1: Hello, and thank you for visiting Suseong Agricultural Corporation.
greeting.p2: We aim to give a clear answer to everyone working to raise the quality of Korea's agricultural and livestock products — our partners at NongHyup and livestock cooperatives, as well as producers and distributors.
greeting.p3: Our core technology, "On-EIO," was created to solve real problems in the field across farming, livestock, and aquaculture. In agriculture it improves soil and prevents pests and disease to dramatically raise yields; in livestock and aquaculture it improves gut health and maximizes disease resistance, delivering the power of a true antibiotic alternative.
greeting.p4: This gives everyone who supplies and distributes agricultural and livestock products the confidence to offer consumers healthier, safer food.
greeting.p5: We invite you to move forward together with Suseong Corporation.
greeting.p6: We aim to be more than a supplier of excellent On-EIO products — a true partner that stands with your company or organization all the way as you realize ESG value and grow into an eco-friendly industry leader.
greeting.p7: Suseong Corporation's door is always open.
greeting.p8: We look forward to supporting your success.
hero.headline: Suseong Agricultural Corporation
hero.intro: We were founded on a mission to fundamentally strengthen the competitiveness of Korea's agriculture, livestock, and fisheries industries through On-EIO (Bio Sulfur) — a distinctive material now pending registration as a new substance — while giving consumers healthier food.
field.agri_desc: Suseong fertilizers improve soil and strengthen crops' natural immunity, preventing pests and disease while dramatically raising yield and quality.
field.livestock_desc: Suseong feed additives fundamentally strengthen livestock immunity and improve gut health, reducing antibiotic use while raising productivity and product quality.
field.aqua_desc: Suseong's aquaculture feed additives are an eco-friendly alternative to antibiotics, maximizing disease resistance in farmed species and improving feed efficiency to dramatically raise productivity.
crisis.heading: [A New Paradigm to Overcome the Crisis and Shape the Future of Agriculture and Livestock]
crisis.s1_title: 1. Korea's Agriculture and Livestock Industry Faces a Real Crisis
crisis.s1_body: Korea's agriculture and livestock industry is facing a serious threat to its sustainability. Chemical fertilizers and antibiotics used as a matter of routine are a leading cause of soil acidification and ecosystem damage. This soil degradation causes continuous-cropping damage and falling agricultural productivity, and creates a problem of harmful residues in livestock and crops. In turn, this leads to groundwater contamination and ecological imbalance, forming a vicious cycle: chemical overuse → environmental pollution → declining safety of agricultural and livestock products → a threat to public health.
crisis.s2_title: 2. A Shift to a New Paradigm: Sustainable Agriculture and Livestock Farming
crisis.s2_body: To overcome this crisis, adopting eco-friendly and sustainable production methods is now essential. The new paradigm goes beyond simply increasing output, focusing instead on building an 'eco-friendly farming system' in harmony with nature. This means protecting public health by supplying safe, reliable, high-quality agricultural and livestock products, while raising farm productivity to increase farmers' income. Securing innovative agricultural technology that earns recognition and competitiveness in global markets is also a core goal for the future of the industry.
crisis.s3_title: 3. The Core Solution for the Future: 'On-EIO'
crisis.s3_body: 'On-EIO' is drawing attention as the next-generation solution to drive this innovation. 'On-EIO' is a substance made by processing naturally sourced sulfur through a proprietary method, and its effects have already been scientifically proven through related technology patents and a full set of test reports. This material is driving innovative change on the ground in agriculture and livestock farming — simultaneously enriching land and improving livestock health.
crisis.s4_agri_body: Applied to soil, it delivers outstanding soil-enrichment effects, restoring soil vitality while reducing chemical fertilizer use. It also promotes crops' nutrient absorption and increases resistance to pests and disease, dramatically improving crop quality. It further contributes to reducing pesticide residue and improving water quality, realizing genuine environmental cleanup value.
crisis.s4_livestock_body: Applied to livestock feed, it strengthens immunity to lower disease incidence and can greatly reduce reliance on antibiotics. This builds an eco-friendly foundation for livestock farming while raising meat, egg, and milk quality itself to a premium grade, increasing added value.
crisis.s5_title: 5. Conclusion: Real Change and a Vision for the Future
crisis.s5_body: In conclusion, the 'On-EIO' solution cuts production costs by reducing chemical fertilizer and antibiotic use, and maximizes productivity by improving soil conditions and livestock health. This will not only raise farmers' incomes but will also serve as a fundamental alternative that improves public health by producing safe food free of harmful residues.

notice.item3: Website Relaunch and Multilingual Service Now Live
notice.item3.body: Suseong Agricultural Corporation's website, previously run as separate desktop and mobile versions, has been redesigned around a mobile-optimized, text-first experience in four languages, reflecting the fact that most visitors access it from mobile devices. Certificates, test data, and photos of every type are now consolidated in the Resource Center for easy viewing.
